title: Width of memory access detection depends on literal

features.name: memory_assignment_with_replication_operator
features.description: Code should include a memory element assignment using the replication operator {1{single_bit_literal}} which should produce a 1-bit result but causes width detection failure

features.name: memory_element_as_index_to_another_memory
features.description: Code should include a memory element that was assigned via replication operator being used as an index into a second memory, triggering width detection failure
